sglang.title: [UnifiedTree]: Pin host buffers across async H→D in UnifiedRadixCache.load_back
sglang.author: hzh0425
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
cache_controller.load(...) is asynchronous — it only enqueues the op and returns device_indices immediately; the actual H→D copy runs later on load_stream and completes via ack_load_queue.finish_event.Today load_back only holds the device lock_ref. But host eviction is gated exclusively b

sglang.title: Fix missing draft KV pool transfers in HybridCacheController
sglang.author: libertyeagle
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The base HiCacheController backs up / loads the draft model's KV pool (attached via set_draft_kv_pool, used with speculative decoding) alongside the target pool in its write and load paths. HybridCacheController overrides start_writing and start_loading but dropped the draft-pool handling

This patch is to fix the dsv4 server + mori ep8 crash during warmup with the following error message:
server command:
SGLANG_MORI_DISPATCH_DTYPE=fp4         \
SGLANG_MORI_COMBINE_DTYPE=fp8               \
SGLANG_DEFAULT_THINKING=1                      \
SGLANG_DSV4_REASONING_EFFORT=max

sglang.title: feat: Support HiCache for MiMo-V2 models (1/N)
sglang.author: acelyc111
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

MiMo-V2 models use asymmetric K/V cache geometry where head_dim != v_head_dim. The existing MHATokenToKVPoolHost assumes K and V share the same per-token item_size, which can make HiCache transfers either fail or copy V with the wrong stride.
This PR adds a dedicated host-pool path for a

Add fused Triton kernels for Qwen3.5 (397B-A17B) to reduce kernel launch overhead and memory allocations in the attention output gate and MoE shared expert paths.
Target model config: hidden_size=4096, num_attention_heads=32, head_dim=256, attn_output_gate=true

fused_sigmoi

sglang.title: [Apple Silicon] [MLX] Fuse SwiGLU activation into gate gather_qmv for SwitchGLU MoE blocks
sglang.author: jlee5814
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
SwitchGLU MoE blocks on Apple Silicon are dominated by two quantized gather matmuls (up_proj, gate_proj) plus a separate silu(gate) x up kernel. Each Metal dispatch carries command-buffer overhead (~1-4ms of GPU idle, profiled in #22114), so dispatch count drives decode latency.
FusedSwit

sglang.author: zijiexia
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What
Adds one generic playground axis — flagSelects — to _playground.jsx. It renders a config-declared list of single-selects, each carrying its own title + stripPrefixes + options:
// in a model config's playgroundFeatures:
flagSelects: [
  {
    id: "kvcache",
    title: "KV Cache DType",
    stri

sglang.title: [Spec] Remove deprecated EAGLE v1 DRAFT_EXTEND forward mode
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
EAGLE v1 is deprecated — all speculative workers are v2. This removes the v1 ForwardMode.DRAFT_EXTEND mode and every code path keyed on it. ForwardMode.DRAFT_EXTEND_V2 is untouched and will be renamed to DRAFT_EXTEND in a follow-up PR.
Commits

Rename is_draft_extend(include_v2=True) → is

Motivation
When running concurrent requests where some use structured output via the LLGuidance backend and others are plain generation requests, the plain requests exhibit corrupted output. The root cause is in GuidanceGrammar.allocate_vocab_mask(). Unlike the XGrammar backend which allocates a fre

sglang.title: [AMD] Support unified_kv_triton for disaggregation
sglang.author: billishyahao

This patch is to add swa_ring state to support the new unified_kv_triton kv layout introduced in PR #27380 where added the unified_kv layout for DeepSeek-V4 , where each layer is a single buffer [swa_pages + compress_pages, head_dim]. After that KV transfer still assumed the old separate

sglang.author: jybsuper
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
GLM-5.1 (GlmMoeDsaForCausalLM, DeepSeek-V3.2-style DSA sparse attention) exposes three indexer projections — wq_b, wk, weights_proj — that select which KV positions sparse attention sees. HF's modeling code implements them as plain nn.Linear under self_attn.indexer.*, so PEFT fine-tunes (

sglang.title: Fix Qwen3.5 deterministic batch-invariant logprobs
sglang.author: zyzshishui
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Qwen3.5 deterministic inference had two batch-size-dependent numerical paths that could make exact output logprobs drift between a single request and the same request inside a larger batch.


The FLA gated layernorm Triton wrapper selected ROWS_PER_BLOCK from the total row count M. In the

sglang.title: fix(sampling): reject non-finite temperature in SamplingParams.verify
sglang.author: Sunt-ing
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
A single user request with temperature set to NaN (or +/-Inf) crashes the whole server.
SamplingParams.verify() guards temperature with if self.temperature < 0.0. Under IEEE-754, nan < 0.0 and inf < 0.0 are both False, so a non-finite temperature passes admission. It then scales the logit

sglang.title: [Docs] Fix outdated benchmark marker API in add-jit-kernel skill
sglang.author: DarkSharpness

Motivation
The add-jit-kernel skill (.claude/skills/add-jit-kernel/SKILL.md) documented an outdated benchmark marker API in Step 5. The decorator names had been renamed and a new knob added in python/sglang/jit_kernel/benchmark/marker.py, so the tutorial no longer matched the real code.

sglang.title: Support GLM-4.7 function calling via structural tags
sglang.author: zRzRzRzRzRzRzR
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The GLM-4.7 MoE function-call detector had supports_structural_tag() hard-coded to
False, so constrained/grammar-guided tool calling was disabled for GLM-4.7.
This forced these models to rely on free-form generation for function calls, which is
less reliable.

vllm.author: jperezdealgaba

Summary

Add compile_regex_with_timeout() utility that wraps regex compilation in a thread with a deadline, preventing ReDoS attacks where adversarial patterns cause exponential DFA state-space explosion.
Apply the timeout to compiler.compile_regex() in the xgrammar backend, oc.Index() in the outlin

vllm.author: jperezdealgaba
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Replace the fatal assertion in _init_mrope_positions that crashes the EngineCore when prompt_token_ids is None. When only prompt_embeds are provided (e.g. /v1/completions with prompt=None + prompt_embeds), derive the sequence length from the embeddings tensor and use dummy token IDs.
This is safe be

vllm.title: [Build] Fix CUDA arch build coverage gaps
vllm.author: Harry-Chen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes several CUDA architecture build/dispatch gaps found while auditing
the CUDA arch matrix in #45260.
The main theme is making top-level arch requests, per-component CMake arch
filters, and runtime support checks agree with each other. Before this change,
some paths either carried
